item.title: Allergens (full list)
item.description: Allergens: 1. Gluten 2. Eggs 3. Fish 4. Peanuts 5. Crustaceans 6. Milk 7. Soy 8. Sesame 9. Nuts 10. Celery 11. Mustard 12. Lupine 13. Sulphur dioxide 14. Molluscs 15. Garlic

item.title: 🍽 HUB1 - Sprout Lunch Menu:
item.description: 🍽 HUB1 - Sprout Lunch Menu: Our daily meal salad rich in seasonal vegetables with a choice of protein

item.title: 🍽 HUB1 - Homebound Lunch Menu:
item.description: 🍽 HUB1 - Homebound Lunch Menu: Mock hare, a Danish classic beef meatloaf topped with crispy bacon, served withbutter roasted potatoes and rich brown cream gravy, finished with parsley.Apple and plum compote and pickled cucumber on the side (1+2+6+11)

item.title: 🍽 HUB1 - Globetrotter Lunch Menu:
item.description: 🍽 HUB1 - Globetrotter Lunch Menu: Bobotie, a South African classic with spiced beef, vegetables and chutney,baked with a savoury egg custard. Served with yellow rice and topped withchives. Tomato sambal and toasted coconut on the side (1+2+6+11+13+15) GREEN DISH: dish GREEN DISH: bobotie with lentils, vegetables and spices, baked with egg custardand served with yellow rice. Tomato sambal and toasted coconut on theside

item.title: 🍽 HUB3 - Lunch Menu:
item.description: 🍽 HUB3 - Lunch Menu: Cured and slow cooked beef brisket, tender and juicy, served with potatoes,carrot brunoise and peas with parsley and shallots. Creamy horseradish sauce onthe side (6+15) GREEN DISH: dish Crispy pakoras with warm spices, served with chutney and raita

item.title: 🍽 HUB2 - Lunch Menu:
item.description: 🍽 HUB2 - Lunch Menu: Feijoada, a Brazilian black bean stew with rich flavours from various cuts andsausages, hearty and bold (15) GREEN DISH: dish GREEN DISH: feijoada with beans and vegetables, rich and warming

item.title: 🍽 HUB1 – Kays - Lunch Menu:
item.description: 🍽 HUB1 – Kays - Lunch Menu: Pulled duck stir fry with ginger, garlic and crisp vegetables, served withjasmine rice and topped with spicy toasted sesame seeds. Carrot and bean sproutsalad with orange sesame vinaigrette (7+8+15) GREEN DISH: Tofu stir fry with ginger, garlic and vegetables, served with jasmine rice andtoasted sesame seeds. Carrot and bean sprout salad with orange sesamevinaigrette
